creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #23)

> devel/grv (I see this already linked)
- project innactive > 5 years
- maintainer timeout (dmgk) > 2 monts
- candidate to deprecation

> devel/gnome-builder (I see this already linked)
- outdated and latest versions require dependencies not ported yet
- canditate to be marked as broken

> deskutils/basket (is maybe new?)
Not new, https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=280704 and linked

Deprecated in 80accc4e562cba94317fc9292dea0ace76ab126d
